name: Mid-Market Manufacturing (DACH)
description: Manufacturing companies with 500-5,000 employees in the DACH region.

tam.source: LLM estimate based on IDC manufacturing cloud spending forecasts (2025)

sam.description: Cloud and managed IT services for DACH mid-market manufacturers
sam.source: LLM estimate: ~8,000 mid-market manufacturers in DACH (Mittelstand), average cloud/IT outsourcing spend EUR 400K-800K per company, addressable segment ~EUR 4.5B

som.description: 80 customers x EUR 350K ACV in 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up: ~8,000 DACH mid-market manufacturers; T-Systems targets 80 new accounts in 3 years (1% penetration) at EUR 350K average ACV (hybrid cloud + cloud migration + managed hyperscaler) = EUR 28M
